title: FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with overdue electric, gas, and water bills. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed. 630 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Must have shut-off notice for utility assistance Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 580-0680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 580-0680 Main phone Main phone (541) 580-0680 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Dillard, Glide, Roseburg, and Winston TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on ground floor Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - PUBLIC SHOWERS, CLOTHING CLOSET, HYGIENE SUPPLIES, BEDDING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG
